## Summary

- What changed
- Why it changed

## Change Type

- [ ] User-visible behavior change
- [ ] API / route / input-output change
- [ ] Internal refactor only
- [ ] Documentation-only

## Doc Sync Checklist

- [ ] I checked whether this PR changes product behavior, inputs, outputs, routes, tabs, scripts, or test coverage
- [ ] I updated `docs/spec.md` if implementation behavior changed
- [ ] I updated `README.md` and `README.zh.md` if the public-facing summary changed
- [ ] I updated `docs/api.http` if request examples or API routes changed
- [ ] I updated `CLAUDE.md` if agent guidance or implementation constraints changed
- [ ] I intentionally made no doc updates because no documented behavior changed

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] Relevant tests passed
- [ ] Not run, with reason explained below

## Notes

- Risks, follow-ups, or anything reviewers should pay attention to
